response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate is a senior-level engineer with no clear evidence of entry-level readiness, lacks proficiency in German (only 'basic'), and has minimal Java exposure despite the role requiring Java proficiency and insurance-sector agile projects — their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven track record in agile practices, CI/CD, and test-driven development
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, failing the core requirement
Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, with Java as a minor footnote
Overqualified and senior-level experience misaligned with junior role expectations
